chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-06 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 278/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 279/19 4. For hearing of main case 15.01.2019 Ms. Nooreen Noor. Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. Learned Counsel for applicants submits that the applicants have been falsely implicated in the present case, however, want to surrender before the concerned Court to seek pre-arrest bail in accordance with law. But since they apprehend their imminent arrest at the hands of police, they have filed this application for protective bail to surrender before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days from today subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 21.01.2019 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
